Premium HSS-Co M35 & M42 Cobalt Twist Drill Bits

The Ultimate Drilling Solution for Stainless Steel and Hard Alloys

When standard high-speed steel fails, Xiaoman Tools' Cobalt series steps in. They are purpose-built to cut through the most abrasive and tough materials in heavy industrial applications.

Why Choose Our Cobalt Drill Bits?

  • Extreme Heat Resistance: The high cobalt content allows the drill bit to withstand extreme drilling temperatures without losing its sharp cutting edge, drastically reducing tool wear.

  • Precision 135° Split Point: Designed to prevent "walking" or wandering on the material surface. It requires less feed pressure and ensures instant, self-centering penetration.

details_html:
Advanced Solid Carbide Through-Coolant Drills

Unleash the Full Potential of Your CNC Machining Centers

Engineered for high-speed and high-feed drilling, Xiaoman Tools' advanced solid carbide through-coolant drill bits are the ultimate solution for demanding manufacturing environments. By delivering high-pressure cutting fluid directly to the cutting zone, these tools eliminate heat build-up and guarantee flawless chip evacuation even in deep-hole applications.

Key Technical Innovations

  • Dual Internal Coolant Channels: Forces coolant straight to the drill tip. This critical feature flushes out chips instantly, prevents material from welding to the edge, and ensures excellent hole finish.
  • High-Performance Nano-Coating: The distinct bronze/copper colored AlTiN/TiAlN nano-coating provides extreme thermal stability and oxidation resistance, allowing for significantly higher cutting speeds and extending tool life.
  • Micro-Grain Solid Tungsten Carbide: Built from premium ultra-fine grain carbide substrate, offering the perfect combination of supreme hardness and vital toughness to resist chipping under heavy CNC loads.
  • Precision Self-Centering Geometry: The optimized point angle and specialized web thinning eliminate the need for center drilling, ensuring accurate hole positioning from the very first touch.

OEM Packaging & Brand Customization

As a professional supplier, we offer flexible OEM solutions to help you build your brand locally:

  • Custom laser etching of your logo and specifications on the drill shank.
  • Premium individual plastic tubes with secure end-caps to prevent transit damage.
  • Customized labeling with your brand's barcode and product details.

Target Applications

Designed for mass production efficiency. Excels in machining Carbon Steel, Alloy Steel, Cast Iron, Tool Steel, and Stainless Steel. Available in various depth ratios including 3xD, 5xD, and 8xD.

High-Precision Exchangeable-Tip Drills (Modular Drills)

Maximize CNC Uptime and Slash Tooling Costs

Engineered for modern high-volume manufacturing, Xiaoman Tools' Exchangeable-Tip Drills provide the ultimate combination of solid carbide performance and indexable convenience. When the cutting edge wears out, simply swap the tungsten carbide tip directly on the machine without removing the drill body. This zero-setup approach minimizes machine downtime and dramatically reduces your overall cost per hole.

Maximum Drilling Capacity, Ultimate Flexibility

Expand the capabilities of your standard drill chucks with Xiaoman Tools' comprehensive range of reduced shank drill bits. Whether you are supplying cost-conscious hardware stores or high-end CNC machining centers, our fully customizable production line allows you to tailor the material, finish, and dimensions to your exact market demands.

Fully Customizable Specifications

Steel Materials: Economical: HSS 4241, HSS 4341, HSS 9341
Industrial: HSS M2 (6542)
Heavy-Duty (Cobalt): HSS-Co M35, HSS-Co M42
Surface Finishes: Bright (Uncoated): Polished design, ideal for aluminum and plastics.
Black Oxide: Retains lubrication and prevents rust.
TiN-Coated (Golden): Increased surface hardness and wear resistance.
Amber (Baked Yellow): Classic heat-resistant finish for cobalt drills.
Length Standards: DIN 338 (Standard), DIN 340 (Long), DIN 1897 (Stub), DIN 1869 (Extra Long), and ANSI Jobber Length.
Shank Sizes: Precisely turned down to 10mm, 13mm (1/2"), or custom diameters.

Core Advantages

  • Universal Compatibility: Fit large diameter drills into standard portable drills and drill presses, eliminating the need for specialized heavy machinery.
  • Precision Ground: Fully ground flutes ensure rapid chip clearance and accurate hole sizing without binding or jamming.
  • OEM/ODM Ready: We offer custom laser marking on the shank and tailored packaging solutions (individual tubes, multi-piece sets, or bulk packages) to amplify your brand value.

details_html:
DCMT11T304-EF CNC Carbide Turning Inserts (PVD Bronze Coated)

Flawless Finishing and Unbeatable Wear Resistance

Elevate your CNC turning operations with Xiaoman Tools' premium DCMT series carbide inserts. Engineered in our advanced manufacturing facility, these 55-degree rhombic inserts are specifically optimized for internal boring and external profiling. Designed to tackle stainless steel and high-hardness alloys, they deliver continuous, reliable performance for high-volume production lines.

Key Technical Advantages

  • Advanced PVD Bronze Coating: The striking antique bronze PVD/CVD coating provides exceptional thermal stability and drastically reduces friction, extending tool life during high-speed finishing operations.
  • Optimized 'EF' Chipbreaker: The precision-molded EF geometry ensures excellent chip control, preventing chip entanglement and resulting in a mirror-like surface finish on the workpiece.
  • Tough Carbide Substrate: Manufactured with a high-density tungsten carbide matrix (Hardness >90), offering maximum resistance to edge chipping and plastic deformation.
  • Factory-Direct Consistency: Packaged in industry-standard 10-piece protective boxes. As a direct manufacturer, we guarantee strict dimensional tolerances and consistent cutting performance across every batch.

Technical Specifications

Grade: YBG205 (or Equivalent)
Insert Shape: 55° Rhombic (Diamond)
Coating & Color: PVD / CVD (Bronze TiAlN/TiN)
Machining Application: Internal Boring / External Turning (Finishing)
Target Materials: Stainless Steel, Hardened Steel, Super Alloys

details_html:
High-Feed LOGU030310ER-GM CNC Milling Inserts (PVD Bronze)

Unleash Maximum Metal Removal Rates in Face Milling

Engineered for high-efficiency roughing and precision finishing, Xiaoman Tools' LOGU series milling inserts are the ultimate choice for heavy-duty CNC machining. Manufactured in our state-of-the-art facility, these robust inserts are specifically designed to tackle tough materials ranging from HRC40 to HRC60. The double-sided geometry ensures maximum cost-efficiency, dramatically lowering your cost per part.

Key Technical Advantages

  • Double-Sided 4 Cutting Edges: The smart rectangular design provides 4 usable cutting edges per insert, doubling your tool life compared to conventional single-sided inserts.
  • Advanced PVD Bronze Coating: The premium antique bronze coating delivers superior oxidation resistance and thermal stability, preventing edge wear even during aggressive high-feed milling.
  • Optimized 'GM' Chipbreaker: Precision-engineered for general-purpose milling (GM), offering a perfect balance between cutting edge strength and smooth chip evacuation.
  • High Hardness Capability: Easily powers through challenging materials including standard steel parts, stainless steel, and hardened alloys up to HRC60.

Technical Specifications

Brand / Manufacturer: Xiaoman Tools (Shanghai, China)
Model Number: LOGU030310ER-GM
Insert Type: High-Feed Face Milling Insert
Coating: PVD / CVD (Antique Bronze)
Target Hardness: HRC40 - HRC60
Target Materials: Steel Parts, Stainless Steel, Hardened Steel
Applicable Equipment: CNC Milling Machines, Machining Centers
Packaging: 10 pcs / Plastic Box (OEM / ODM Supported)
